channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 2026 NFL Free Agency: The Top 100 Players Available and Potential Fits
item.description: Who are the best free agents available in the NFL this offseason? We rank the top 100, and share some possible fits for each.

item.title: Kansas Star Darryn Peterson on Criticism: 'I Don't Pay Attention to it Anymore'
item.description: Kansas Jayhawks star Darryn Peterson made it clear that he doesn't "pay attention" to those criticizing his health.

item.title: 2026 NFL Draft: Would Fernando Mendoza Have Been the Top QB in 2025 Draft Class?
item.description: League sources were mixed on whether Fernando Mendoza would've been the top quarterback prospect in the 2025 NFL Draft.

item.title: 2026 NFL Draft: Fernando Mendoza Isn't Patrick Mahomes, But ...
item.description: Here's why Fernando Mendoza is a great fit for the Raiders, and why his playing style might make him a top-10 QB for years to come.

item.title: 2026 NFL Offseason Buzz, Rumors: Falcons Announce They're Cutting Kirk Cousins
item.description: Here's the latest offseason buzz and rumors around the NFL.

item.title: Sale signs 1-year, $27M extension with Braves
item.description: Chris Sale and the Braves are in agreement on a one-year, $27 million contract extension for 2027 that includes a club option for 2028.

item.title: Women's Bracketology: How two upsets turned the ACC into a nine-bid league
item.description: Sometimes one big win can elevate a team off the bubble. Clemson and Virginia got those victories Sunday.

item.title: 'Oh god! Who built this?': The origin of the WWE Elimination Chamber
item.description: At the 2002 Survivor Series, six WWE superstars entered the Elimination Chamber. We look back at that night.

item.title: Men's Bracketology: Duke's ascension to No. 1 overall was inevitable
item.description: It was only a matter of time until a path opened for the Blue Devils, who ride their win over Michigan to the top.

item.title: Falcons GM: QB Cousins to be released March 11
item.description: New Falcons GM Ian Cunningham has informed QB Kirk Cousins that the team will release him on March 11, the first day of the league year, Cunningham sa...
